title: M-Web repeating blaster
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''M-Web Repeating Blaster''' was a [[Heavy repeating blaster/Legends|heavy repeating blaster]] produced by [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]] following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. It was one of the variations of the [[E-Web heavy repeating blaster cannon|E-Web Repeating Blaster]].

The M-Web, or 'Mobile Weapon Heavy Blaster', was similar to the standard E-Web model, though this version was not a fixed emplacement model. Small [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlifts]] built into the turret and power generator allowed the cannon and tripod to be easily moved around the battlefield.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-10-26 -->''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''
